summary: Fixed three simplicity violations from the previous review: inlined the single-call-site `getExtensions` helper directly into `fireExtension` in extension-registry.mjs, inlined `recordFailure` into the catch block in extension-runner.mjs, and inlined the `safePath` traversal check at its single call site in extension-loader.mjs. Also tightened the null filter to `result != null` (loose equality) to correctly exclude undefined hook returns.
